data.title: GrantWatch connects nonprofits to thousands of foundation grants during the 2025 government shutdown, offering critical support.
data.description: GrantWatch is stepping in to bridge the gap for nonprofits during the ongoing federal government shutdown. The program, located in Boynton Beach, Florida, is providing vital support by linking organizations to numerous foundation and private grants. With government aid on hold, this lifeline is crucial for nonprofits facing stalled programs and uncertain staff situations. GrantWatch's services offer access to thousands of grants, offering much-needed assistance during this challenging time.

data.title: Fosun's chairman Wang Qunbin highlights innovation at Sustainability Global Leaders Conference in Shanghai with 500 guests.
data.description: In Shanghai on October 16, 2025, the 2025 Sustainability Global Leaders Conference took place, focusing on the theme "Joining Hands to Address Challenges: Global Action, Innovation, and Sustainable Growth". The event gathered around 500 attendees, discussing key issues related to sustainability.

data.title: New from Gala Games: VEXI Nightshade, a gothic character unveiled in a Mystery Box release. Limited availability and special offers!

The release offers exclusive special deals along with the opportunity to explore the odds of obtaining VEXI Nightshade in this unique collection.

data.title: Westhaven Gold Corp. reports former CFO's prosecution stayed, stemming from 2018 conduct in BC. Termination on Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 16, 2025, Westhaven Gold Corp. (TSX-V:WHN) disclosed that the case against its former Chief Financial Officer, Shaun Pollard, for violating specific Securities Act (British Columbia) regulations related to actions in September 2018, was halted on October 9, 2025. This stay on legal actions effectively ended the prosecution of Mr. Pollard.

data.title: atai Life Sciences priced public offering of 23,725,000 common shares at $5.48/share, with an option for 3,558,750 more shares.
data.description: Atai Life Sciences, a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ as ATAI, disclosed the pricing details of a recently announced underwritten offering on October 16, 2025. The offering entails 23,725,000 common shares being sold at a rate of $5.48 per share. Moreover, Atai has given underwriters a 30-day option to buy a supplementary 3,558,750 common shares at the offering price, excluding the underwriting discount. It is important to note that all common shares to be offered will be from Atai's ownership.

data.title: Driven Tech Inc. honored as a 2025 CRN Triple Crown Award Winner by The Channel Company for excellence in solutions.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 16, 2025, Driven Tech Inc., also known as Driven Technologies, revealed that they have been named a recipient of the prestigious 2025 Triple Crown Award by CRN, a subsidiary of The Channel Company. This distinguished accolade is given to solution providers who have been recognized on the following platforms.
